title: Nordby Bakker & Issehoved
description: 11–18km loops through glacial valleys and west coast cliffs. Ballebjerg lookout tower at 64m — the highest point on the island.

title: Island Cycling Routes
description: Full island loop (~60km) or Stavns Fjord circuit. E-bikes from Ø-Hjul or Samsø Cykler at Sælvig harbour. Asparagus farm stalls en route.

title: Gastronomy
description: Nordby Kro, Nordby 13, Røgeriet smoked fish, Samsø Madsnedkeri, Restaurant Dokken. May = peak asparagus, early strawberries, rhubarb.

title: Sams Island Distillery
description: Gin, rum, vodka and local snaps in Brundby. Founded 2017. Optional detour (~DKK 100–150/person for a tasting).

title: Seal Safari & Stavns Fjord
description: Old wooden boat M/S Tunø from Langør. Stavns Fjord birdlife lagoon and the Energy Academy in Tranebjerg (~DKK 150–200).
